package.name: hexa_display
package.description: Hexapod "face" renderer as a ROS2 node. Drives a 256x64 SH1122 OLED directly from a Raspberry Pi (spidev + the kernel GPIO character device), reusing the platform-free eye animation core (EyeAnim/EyeRaster) that is also used by the ESP32 firmware. Self-contained: that core and the u8g2 C driver are vendored under vendor/ (see vendor/README.md), so the package builds without a firmware checkout. No external GPIO library.
